intended_use: ENT EM is intended as an image-guided planning and navigation system to enable ENT procedures. The device is indicated for any medical condition in which a reference to a rigid anatomical structure ca
intended_use_full: ENT EM is intended as an image-guided planning and navigation system to enable ENT procedures. The device is indicated for any medical condition in which a reference to a rigid anatomical structure can be identified relative to images (CT, CTA, X-Ray, MR, MRA and ultrasound) of the anatomy, such as: Intranasal structures and Paranasal Sinus Surgery (Functional endoscopic sinus surgery (FESS), Intranasal structures and paranasal sinus surgery, including revision and distorted anatomy) and Anterior skull base procedures
target_condition: Conditions requiring ENT procedures including functional endoscopic sinus surgery (FESS), paranasal sinus surgery, and anterior skull base procedures
ground_truth: Reference device (Cranial EM System K213989) and predicate device (StealthStation FlexENT K200723)
other_metrics: Mean Positional Error of placed instrument's tip ≤ 2 mm; Mean Angular Error of placed instrument's axis ≤ 2°; Performance testing showed equivalent performance with and without AI/ML landmark detection
